docs.name: Flip Card
docs.description: 3D card flip with spring physics, supporting hover or click triggers.

props.name: front
props.description: The leading visible standard interface node.

props.name: back
props.description: The trailing hidden secondary information node.

props.name: className
props.description: Overarching classes driving constraints on the 3D rotating canvas.

props.name: frontClassName
props.description: Granular overrides for the un-rotated visual state.

props.name: backClassName
props.description: Granular overrides targeting the inverted 180-degree state representation.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Enum literal targeting 'hover' execution or explicit 'click' toggles.

props.name: direction
props.description: Axis orientation literal mapping rotation logic to 'horizontal' vs 'vertical'.

props.name: perspective
props.description: Z-depth translation simulating three-dimensional depth stretching.

docs.overview: FlipCard reveals a back face on hover or click with a smooth 3D rotation. Supports horizontal and vertical flip axes and can wrap any React content on either face.

scenarios.title: Team member bio card
scenarios.description: Show a photo and name on the front; reveal role, bio, and social links on the back.

scenarios.title: Click-to-reveal FAQ card
scenarios.description: Use trigger="click" and vertical flip for a fun alternative to a standard accordion.
